title: Macron calls Trump's remarks on his marriage 'inelegant'
summary_full: French President Emmanuel Macron has said Donald Trump's comments about his marriage were "neither elegant nor up to standard".
summary_public: French President Emmanuel Macron has said Donald Trump's comments about his marriage were "neither elegant nor up to standard".
